scripts.dev:backend: bash -lc 'cd apps/backend && PYTHON_BIN="python3" && if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then PYTHON_BIN="$(pwd)/.venv/bin/python"; fi && if [ -f .env ]; then set -a && . ./.env && set +a; fi && UVICORN_HOST="${UVICORN_HOST:-0.0.0.0}" && UVICORN_PORT="${UVICORN_PORT:-8000}" && "$PYTHON_BIN" -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host "$UVICORN_HOST" --port "$UVICORN_PORT"'
scripts.test:backend: bash -lc 'cd apps/backend && PYTHON_BIN="python3" && if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then PYTHON_BIN="$(pwd)/.venv/bin/python"; fi && "$PYTHON_BIN" -m pytest'
